ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_title" TEXT /* Title of the show */,
  "show_description" TEXT /* Description of the show */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network broadcasting the show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the show started airing */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the show ended airing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the show (e.g., in production, on hiatus, canceled, ended) */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Average runtime of episodes in the show */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the show is produced */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the creator(s) of the show */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Company producing the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the season belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Number of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started airing */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended airing */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the season */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the season */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date production started for the season */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date production ended for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_num_in_season" INTEGER /* Number of the episode within the season */,
  "episode_num_overall" INTEGER /* Overall number of the episode in the show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "directed_by" TEXT /* Director of the episode */,
  "written_by" TEXT /* Writer(s) of the episode */,
  "original_air_date" TEXT /* Original air date of the episode */,
  "prod_code" TEXT /* Production code of the episode */,
  "us_viewers" REAL /* Number of US viewers for the episode */,
  "episode_type" TEXT /* Type of episode (e.g., regular, special, pilot) */,
  "script_versions" INTEGER /* Number of script versions */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments during production */,
  "viewership_trends" TEXT /* Trends in viewership (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "international_audience" TEXT /* Information about international viewership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards and recognitions received by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards and recognitions received by the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_writers" (
  "episode_writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode-writer relationship */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_writers_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_writers_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_directors" (
  "episode_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode-director relationship */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_directors_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, director, writer, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the episode */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user providing the rating */,
  "thumbs_up_down" TEXT /* Binary rating (thumbs up or down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
